name: Raidraptor Replica
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒ・Ｒ・Ｒ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ・レプリカ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Raidraptor" monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from your Deck, and if you do, as long as you control the face-up Special Summoned monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot target the targeted monster for attacks, also your opponent cannot target the targeted monster with card effects.
eff: Target 1 "Raidraptor" monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from your Deck, and if you do, as long as you control the face-up Special Summoned monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot target the targeted monster for attacks, also your opponent cannot target the targeted monster with card effects.

mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Archetype condition<!--This is present in the JP text, please do not remove this category-->
